name: ClawGuard Runtime Guard
description: Tier-1 deterministic runtime policy for OpenClaw tool calls. Spawns the clawguard runtime broker subprocess and blocks catastrophic actions (rm -rf, fork bomb, DROP TABLE, ...) before they execute.
author: AgentSec-A2S

clawguardBin.description: Path to the clawguard binary. Defaults to `clawguard` on PATH.

manifestPath.description: Override policy manifest. Defaults to ~/.clawguard/policy.toml (built-in defaults if missing).

logLevel.description: Stderr log verbosity for the plugin bridge.

bypassTools.description: Tool names to skip (pass-through without policy evaluation). Use sparingly.
